## Performance Problem
**What's slow or using too many resources?**

## System Specifications
- CPU: (e.g., Intel i7, M1 Mac, etc.)
- RAM: (e.g., 8GB, 16GB)
- Storage: (SSD/HDD)
- Python version:
- Image characteristics:
  - Resolution: 
  - File size: 
  - Number of SLF in image: 

## Current Performance
- Processing time per image: 
- Memory usage: 
- CPU usage: 

## Expected Performance
- Target processing time: 
- Acceptable resource usage: 

## Reproducible Example
```python

```

## Processing Stage
Which stage is slow?
- [ ] Preprocessing (Stage 1)
- [ ] Region Proposal (Stage 2)  
- [ ] Heuristic Filter (Stage 3a)
- [ ] Descriptor Classifier (Stage 3b)
- [ ] Overall pipeline

## Additional Context
- [ ] Issue occurs with all images
- [ ] Issue occurs only with large images
- [ ] Issue occurs only with heavily loaded traps
- [ ] Performance degrades over time
